title: Summarize issue evidence and propose a bounded implementation slice

task_selection.selection_rationale: Representative task with low mutation risk.
stop_conditions: Worker output loops or repeats unsupported completion claims.
Worker output requires private context not present in the ticket.
Supervisor verification cost exceeds the direct-work estimate.

manual_checks: Supervisor checked each accepted claim against cited source files.

outcome.rationale: Worker evidence reduced supervisor synthesis cost despite imperfect claims.

supervisor_assessment.direct_work_counterfactual: Supervisor likely would have spent more tokens reading and summarizing the same sources directly.
supervisor_assessment.policy_implication: Keep evidence-intake tasks eligible for no-tool proposal delegation.
